# PUT /api/v1/org/regions/{id}/deactivate

**Deactivate Region**

إلغاء تفعيل منطقة

Operation ID: `API-ORG-016`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: REGION_UPDATE (found on service:RegionService)

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer | Yes |  |
